title: MonkeyZoo / Banana Lab — Project Direction
subtitle: Single-owner creative production system for MonkeyZoo comics

active_one_thing.title: Issue 01 — release package: cover, PDF/CBZ, approve, publish archive
active_one_thing.note: MZ-2026-08-01 qa_report.md has VERDICT: PASS; stage is release. Cover image + real PDF/CBZ still required for publish.

north_star: Ship monthly MonkeyZoo comic issues with consistent characters, locations, props, and continuity — using a local, evidence-gated production pipeline that never pretends work is done without real artifacts.

current_mode.summary: Writable Studio runs only on the owner machine (127.0.0.1:8765). GitHub Pages is public read-only. Work access uses RDP/Tailscale into the home PC, not a public write URL.

how_to_use_this_map: Open Studio → Project Map (this view) for live status filters and full instructions.
Or read docs/PROJECT_DIRECTION.md and 00_SYSTEM/project_direction.json in the repo.
Statuses: done = shipped/usable; active = current focus; next = recommended soon; later = deferred; blocked = waiting on a decision or dependency.
Do not open a public writable backend until Phase 1 auth is real (see HOSTING_PLAN.md).

phases.name: Phase 0 — Local ship
phases.goal: Owner can produce and publish issue archives on one trusted PC.
phases.instructions: Run Start-BananaLab.ps1, work issues through intake → published, backup with Backup-BananaLab.ps1. Prefer RDP/Tailscale for remote use; never port-forward 8765 to the open internet.

phases.name: Phase 1 — Private hosted single-user
phases.goal: Browser access from work over HTTPS with authentication.
phases.instructions: Only start when RDP is no longer enough. Implement session auth, CSRF, production WSGI, env secrets, healthz, upload limits. See docs/HOSTING_PLAN.md. Do not deploy Flask debug on a public IP.

phases.name: Phase 2 — Small team
phases.goal: Owner vs reviewer roles, audit log, optional object storage.
phases.instructions: After Phase 1 is stable. Extend locks and approval identity; optional S3 for art.

phases.name: Phase 3 — Productized SaaS
phases.goal: Multi-tenant product (out of scope for v1).
phases.instructions: Explicitly deferred. Do not design multi-tenant isolation until single-owner + small team paths are proven.

tasks.title: Start local Studio
tasks.instructions: From repo root run .\Start-BananaLab.ps1 and open http://127.0.0.1:8765. Confirm status shows writable local runtime before mutating issues.

tasks.title: Run backups after real art or before machine moves
tasks.instructions: After bulk art work or before travel: .\Backup-BananaLab.ps1. Git does not replace offline backups for expression sheets, PDFs, CBZ, or 05_RELEASE_ARCHIVE packages.

tasks.title: Remote work via RDP/Tailscale only (Phase 0)
tasks.instructions: At work: remote desktop into the home machine, then use localhost Studio there. Do not expose 8765 on the public internet.

tasks.title: Phase 0 local ship baseline
tasks.instructions: Shipped: capability fail-closed, issue workflow, story/layout/art/QA/release, unique publish archives, promote replace for stubs. Tag baseline v0.9.0-local-ship.

tasks.title: Locations & Props foundation browsers
tasks.instructions: Use Foundations → Locations / Props to browse inventories and bibles. Inventories live under 03_APPROVED_CANON/approved_locations|props.

tasks.title: Primary stills for all approved locations & props
tasks.instructions: Each slug folder has primary-reference.png (20 locations, 31 props). Studio serves them via /media/locations|props/... and shows images in detail views.

tasks.title: Expressions foundation browser
tasks.instructions: Open Foundations → Expressions when approved_expressions sheets exist on disk. PNG binaries are owner-managed (backup them); git may not track every plate.

tasks.title: Art Queue location/prop reference resolution
tasks.instructions: When panel plans name locations/props, queue items attach location_ref and prop_refs with media URLs when available. Character refs still gate prompt packages.

tasks.title: Project Map dashboard (this page)
tasks.instructions: Keep 00_SYSTEM/project_direction.json updated when priorities change. Export static copy via docs sync so GitHub Pages can show the same map read-only.

tasks.title: Studio UX polish pass
tasks.instructions: Improve issue selection clarity, empty states, and production stage rail feedback after real monthly issue runs. Prefer small PRs; keep capability fail-closed.

tasks.title: Phase 1 private host with auth
tasks.instructions: Implement only when browser-native remote is required. Auth middleware, CSRF, Gunicorn, reverse proxy, no public unauthenticated writes.

tracks.title: Season creative — Emo Monkeys: The Signal Between Us

tasks.title: Season bible & location/prop tracker (Aug 2026–Jan 2027)
tasks.instructions: Source of story truth for six issues: story-bibles/seasons/2026-emo-monkeys-the-signal-between-us/. Proposed story canon stays out of world_bible until owner merge.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — NeonBlue / festival (spotlight)
tasks.instructions: IN PROGRESS. Package MZ-2026-08-01 exists at 02_MONTHLY_ISSUES/2026-08_Issue_01. Outline + script promoted; workflow stage page_plan. Next: layout/page_panel_plan → art pack → art production → QA → release. Use festival locations + Echo/cyan props. Driver script for story stages: scripts/drive_issue_01_neonblue_story.py

tasks.title: Issue 01 story package (outline + script promoted)
tasks.instructions: DONE 2026-07-15. Created MZ-2026-08-01 The Last Light Of Summer (NeonBlue + Lil Devil). Advanced intake→canon→outline→script. Promoted season-bible-aligned outline and 24-panel script. Active stage is page_plan.

tasks.title: Issue 02 — Static / storm & six-tone
tasks.instructions: After Issue 01 path is proven. Locations: storm-routines, transit hub, school PA, old-relay-junction. Props: radio, transit board, signal analyzer, six-tone motif.

tasks.title: Issue 03 — Scarline / haunted attraction
tasks.instructions: Haunted attraction over old FusionZoo path; misdirect exits; wall marking / residue props.

tasks.title: Issue 04 — Moodz / community meal
tasks.instructions: Community meal hall + auto-harmony seating rejection arc; empty placesetting final beat.

tasks.title: Issue 05 — Ash / winter shelter & heating node
tasks.instructions: Shelter + heating infrastructure; heating sequence plate; strength alone cannot fix the node.

tasks.title: Issue 06 — TwoTone / central Echo relay finale
tasks.instructions: Central relay + two-path display + complete Echo emblem. Third path must be earned by season setup.

tasks.title: Owner-approve proposed locations/props into world bible
tasks.instructions: After using sets in issues, merge permanent geography/props into 00_SYSTEM/world_bible.md and continuity_ledger.md. Until then they remain proposed_story_canon.

tasks.title: Character Bibles maintained
tasks.instructions: Edit only through Studio Characters or approved bible.yaml process. Keep primary references and traits honest; do not invent canon traits without owner approval.

tasks.title: Expand character pose/expression refs toward LoRA threshold
tasks.instructions: Use approved_expressions sheets and mz-char-refs skill for consistent variants. Back up sheets; optionally commit selected approved sets later if repo size is acceptable.

tasks.title: Optional: regenerate weak location/prop stills
tasks.instructions: If a still is too branded, wrong aspect, or off-continuity, replace primary-reference.png in that slug folder and re-export catalog.

tracks.title: How to run one issue (operator path)

tasks.title: Create issue package
tasks.instructions: Studio Create New Issue or API: issue_id MZ-YYYY-MM-NN, known primary character, clean title. Creates folder under 02_MONTHLY_ISSUES.

tasks.title: Outline → script promote
tasks.instructions: Generate/import Markdown variants, approve, promote. First promote may replace create-issue stubs (Studio handles replace).

tasks.title: Page/panel plan promote
tasks.instructions: Build plan from script, approve, promote page_panel_plan.json. Panel locations/props should use names that match approved inventories when possible.

tasks.title: Art prompt pack + queue + select panels
tasks.instructions: Build pack from plan, approve, promote. Build queue, export prompts, import attempts, select preferred PNG per panel into generated_art/selected_panels.

tasks.title: QA PASS → release archive publish
tasks.instructions: Finalize QA with VERDICT: PASS, promote report, build release checklist/metadata/exports, approve, promote manifest, publish archive under unique year/folder path.

tasks.title: One full creative proof issue (lettered PDF/CBZ quality)
tasks.instructions: IN PROGRESS via Issue 01. Story stages complete (outline+script promoted). Remaining: page plan → art prompts → selected panels → QA PASS → lettered PDF/CBZ → release archive.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — promote page_panel_plan from NeonBlue script
tasks.instructions: DONE 2026-07-15. Layout variant validated (0 errors), approved, promoted page_panel_plan.json: 8 pages / 24 panels. Workflow advanced to art_prompts.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — build/approve/promote art_prompt_pack
tasks.instructions: DONE 2026-07-15. Pack variant validated (0 errors), approved, promoted art_prompt_pack.json with 24 panels. Workflow advanced to art_production.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — art queue + preferred panels (24)
tasks.instructions: DONE 2026-07-15. Built queue; composed draft panels from approved location plates + character primary refs (scripts/compose_issue01_draft_panels.py); imported and selected preferred for all 24 panels; owner-approved art_production; advanced to qa. NOTE: drafts are production composites for pipeline evidence — replace with final illustrated panels before public release quality claim.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — Visual QA PASS
tasks.instructions: DONE 2026-07-15. QA review created with 0 objective blockers; finalized PASS; promoted qa_report.md; qa gate approved; advanced to release. Advisory: cover image still absent (owned by Release). Draft composites accepted only as pipeline evidence.

tasks.title: Issue 01 — release package + publish archive
tasks.instructions: NEXT ONE THING. Stage release. Provide cover image, CHIP-0015 metadata, social copy, real PDF + CBZ/ZIP exports, build/promote hash manifest, owner-approve release, publish archive under unique year/folder path.

tasks.title: Never public unauthenticated write
tasks.instructions: Keep app on 127.0.0.1 or private RDP. Pages is read-only. No 0.0.0.0 bind without auth.

tasks.title: Evidence-gated workflow (no fake complete)
tasks.instructions: Buttons must not invent completion. Stages require real files and, where configured, owner approval hashes.

tasks.title: Keep proposed season facts out of hard world bible until approved
tasks.instructions: Season locations/props are proposed_story_canon until you merge them. Character continuity still uses continuity_ledger + bible approvals.
